originalTitle: Trump calls Walmart ‘patriotic’ for cutting beef prices — in a stark change of tune
summary: The president hasn’t always approved of Walmart’s moves, having criticized the chain’s response to tariffs last year.
content: The president hasn’t always approved of Walmart’s moves, having criticized the chain’s response to tariffs last year.
chineseTitle: 特朗普称沃尔玛降低牛肉价格是“爱国”——语气发生了明显转变
chineseSummary: 总统并不总是批准沃尔玛的举措，他去年批评了该连锁店对关税的反应。
chineseContent: 总统并不总是批准沃尔玛的举措，他去年批评了该连锁店对关税的反应。
whyItMatters: 这条信息属于财经市场信号，适合用于观察利率、汇率、股债商品、金融机构和宏观政策变化。
